title: Lance of Longinus Any Suggestions
wikitext:
[]: Lance of Longinus -- Any Suggestions?             Quote Post by sachiel » Sun Aug 07, 2005 8:00 pm Shnooks is making a Lance of Longinus out of wood to sell (she doesn't have the internet at the moment, so I'm posting for her). Well, she's not sure if she's going to make it out of wood. She's not really sure how to make it. So she wanted me to make this thread. (http://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/e/e5/EvaLance.JPG) There's a shitty reference. Anyway, have any suggestions? On a side note, I searched for that picture on Google, and I only typed in 'lance of longinus'. I found more Evangelion screenshots than pictures of Jesus.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Aug 09, 2005 9:35 am How big is the lance going to be?

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Tue Aug 09, 2005 10:30 am Hm, well, certainly not life-size. o__o; I'm making a guess, but probably around 5ft or so.

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Tue Aug 09, 2005 1:47 pm Deleted.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Tue Aug 09, 2005 3:15 pm get some kind of thin metal that comes in strips (if there is a metal shop nearby, perhaps you could find it there) you would probably want something pretty thin, so that you could bend it around to make the main shaft (you would have something in the middle of it as a shape to base it off of) and thicker metal for the prongs... sounds like a fun project

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Sat Aug 20, 2005 5:22 pm If you can make it from metal, that would give the best effect of it being a lance then spraypaint it red... or black w/e lance u like. personally im all for the red. and if you sold that ummm wouldnt ginax like eat you alive for copywright infringement or w/e

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sun Aug 21, 2005 11:42 am Well, you could just alter it slightly... Besides, it doesn't sound like she is going to make a production line of these things

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Sun Aug 21, 2005 9:22 pm @bluetree: Hmmm, I dunno? XD We're making it as a cosplay prop. People make EVA plugsuits and stuff to sell all the time, and if nobody's been sued for it yet, I assume it's not gonna happen to us. Thanks for the suggestions!

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Mon Aug 22, 2005 9:34 am Good luck!

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Thu Aug 25, 2005 9:39 pm well i was justing thinking, u said u wanted to sell it after all. how is it someing alone anyways? send pics. me likey pictures!

[]:             Quote Post by sachiel » Thu Aug 25, 2005 9:42 pm I don't really know. o.o I don't know if she's started it, yet. XD Haha. I think she's going to make the lance with her uncle, and then maybe a little help from me. But I'm not too good with these things, so I'm not sure how much I'm actually going to have to do with it.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Fri Aug 26, 2005 8:51 am Well, when it is done please post pictures of it! It sounds rather cool.

[]:             Quote Post by TheBlueTree » Fri Aug 26, 2005 2:54 pm yeah, and if you can't give us details. me likey details! lol btw whered u get your sig thats cute.

[]:             Quote Post by phanthompain » Wed Feb 08, 2006 7:47 am Well imagine a cosplay eva 00 removing the lance from a cosplay lilith then tossing it at a cosplay angel. Add in a few fireworks or sparklers and I think this might go into the live action movie. But the thought of a Lance replica sounds really good, good luck with it. *projects ATF but to no avail*
